requirement_topic.en: Phthalates in Children's Textile Products — Canada Consumer Product Safety Act / SOR/2016-188
requirement_topic.zh: 儿童纺织产品中的邻苯二甲酸酯——《加拿大消费品安全法》/ SOR/2016-188
requirement_topic.zht: 兒童紡織產品中的鄰苯二甲酸酯——《加拿大消費品安全法》/ SOR/2016-188

summary.en: The Phthalates Regulations, SOR/2016-188, made under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act, restrict specified phthalates in covered children's products and child-care articles. For textiles and apparel, the risk is usually in plasticized components rather than the base fabric: PVC prints, plastisol graphics, rubbery appliques, coated labels, zipper pulls, charms, patches, rainwear coatings, bibs, costume accessories, and soft plastic parts that may be mouthed. Exporters should screen all accessible plasticized components in children's apparel and related accessories.
summary.zh: 《邻苯二甲酸酯条例》SOR/2016-188依据《加拿大消费品安全法》制定，限制覆盖范围内儿童产品和儿童护理用品中的特定邻苯二甲酸酯。对纺织品和服装而言，风险通常不在基布，而在塑化部件：PVC印花、塑溶胶图案、橡胶感贴花、涂层标签、拉链头、吊饰、徽章、雨衣涂层、围兜、化装配件及可能被放入口中的软塑料部件。出口商应筛查儿童服装及相关配件中所有可接触塑化部件。
summary.zht: 《鄰苯二甲酸酯條例》SOR/2016-188依據《加拿大消費品安全法》制定，限制覆蓋範圍內兒童產品和兒童護理用品中的特定鄰苯二甲酸酯。對紡織品和服裝而言，風險通常不在基布，而在塑化部件：PVC印花、塑溶膠圖案、橡膠感貼花、塗層標籤、拉鏈頭、吊飾、徽章、雨衣塗層、圍兜、化裝配件及可能被放入口中的軟塑料部件。出口商應篩查兒童服裝及相關配件中所有可接觸塑化部件。

standards_or_laws: Canada Consumer Product Safety Act, S.C. 2010, c. 21

summary.en: China's GB 31701-2015 and GB 18401-2010 address many textile safety topics but do not provide a complete substitute for Canada's phthalates restrictions in children's products and child-care articles. Chinese apparel testing packages may omit phthalates unless plastic accessories or coatings are specifically identified. Export bills of materials often describe trims generically, so PVC or other plasticized materials may not be visible from the fabric test report.
summary.zh: 中国GB 31701-2015和GB 18401-2010覆盖多项纺织品安全内容，但不能完整替代加拿大对儿童产品和儿童护理用品中邻苯二甲酸酯的限制。中国服装测试包可能不会检测邻苯二甲酸酯，除非明确识别塑料配件或涂层。出口物料清单常以笼统方式描述辅料，因此仅从面料检测报告可能看不出PVC或其他塑化材料。
summary.zht: 中國GB 31701-2015和GB 18401-2010覆蓋多項紡織品安全內容，但不能完整替代加拿大對兒童產品和兒童護理用品中鄰苯二甲酸酯的限制。中國服裝測試包可能不會檢測鄰苯二甲酸酯，除非明確識別塑料配件或塗層。出口物料清單常以籠統方式描述輔料，因此僅從面料檢測報告可能看不出PVC或其他塑化材料。

standards_or_laws: GB 31701-2015 — Safety Technical Code for Textile Products for Infants and Young Children (mandatory)
GB 18401-2010 — National General Safety Technical Code for Textile Products (mandatory)

gap.en: The practical gap is component-level testing. A garment may pass Chinese textile chemical tests while a plastic zipper pull, heat-transfer print, badge, or coated accessory contains restricted phthalates. Children's products should be reviewed by age grading, foreseeable mouthing, and accessibility of soft plastic parts. Supplier declarations should be supported by bill-of-material review and targeted testing of plasticized components, especially when using PVC, plastisol, soft rubber, or unknown recycled plastics.
gap.zh: 实际差距在于部件级测试。一件服装可能通过中国纺织品化学测试，但塑料拉链头、热转印图案、徽章或涂层配件可能含有限制邻苯二甲酸酯。儿童产品应按年龄分级、可预见入口行为和软塑部件可接触性进行审查。供应商声明应由物料清单审查和塑化部件定向测试支持，尤其是在使用PVC、塑溶胶、软橡胶或来源不明再生塑料时。
gap.zht: 實際差距在於部件級測試。一件服裝可能通過中國紡織品化學測試，但塑料拉鏈頭、熱轉印圖案、徽章或塗層配件可能含有限制鄰苯二甲酸酯。兒童產品應按年齡分級、可預見入口行為和軟塑部件可接觸性進行審查。供應商聲明應由物料清單審查和塑化部件定向測試支持，尤其是在使用PVC、塑溶膠、軟橡膠或來源不明再生塑料時。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Phthalates Regulations SOR/2016-188 are legally binding for covered children's products and child-care articles under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory textile safety under GB 31701/GB 18401 for domestic children's textiles, but no automatic equivalence to Canadian phthalates restrictions

source.publisher: Justice Laws Website / Government of Canada

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For children's apparel and accessories, phthalates compliance is a component-level CCPSA issue. Base-fabric GB reports are not enough where PVC, plastisol, soft plastic, rubbery, coated, or mouthing-accessible components are present.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】对儿童服装和配件而言，邻苯二甲酸酯合规是CCPSA项下的部件级问题。存在PVC、塑溶胶、软塑、橡胶感、涂层或可入口接触部件时，仅有基布GB报告不足够。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】對兒童服裝和配件而言，鄰苯二甲酸酯合規是CCPSA項下的部件級問題。存在PVC、塑溶膠、軟塑、橡膠感、塗層或可入口接觸部件時，僅有基布GB報告不足夠。
